text:
Data
Describe your data source(s), including where it came from, the key variables, and any pre-processing steps.


Code
# Load libraries and data
library(tidyverse)

# Load EPA Chemical Data Reporting (CDR) Data
cdr <- X2024_CDR_Manufacture_Import_Information
glimpse(cdr)

# Check how many rows of data
nrow(cdr) ## 50116 rows

# Drop CBI facilities
cdr <- cdr[cdr$`SITE NAICS ACTIVITY 1` != "CBI",]

# Check how many rows of data
nrow(cdr) ## 43042, so dropped 7074 rows 

# Keep only manufacturing or "both" facilities; drop importing
cdr <- cdr[cdr$`SITE NAICS ACTIVITY 1` != "Import",]

# Check how many rows of data
nrow(cdr) ## 29559, so dropped another 13483 rows; in total, 20557 dropped
